channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Linxr — Alpine Linux on Android (No Root)
item.description: What is Linxr? Linxr = Linux + r (as in: run it). Linux in your pocket. Linxr is a single Android APK that runs a full Alpine Linux environment on any non-rooted Android phone. No Termux. No root....

item.title: The Four Gates: A Practical Threat Model for Agentic AI Systems
item.description: A diagnostic framework for evaluating the security posture of AI agents that act on your behalf—covering threat layers, attack surfaces, access boundaries, and governance. The Problem Nobody Ships...

item.title: Difference between global & globalThis
item.description: Let's get straight to the point. global and globalThis both refer to JavaScript's global object, but they differ in scope and compatibility across environments. What is global?? global is...

item.title: Google’s latest Pixel Watches have fallen to their lowest prices ever
item.description: With longer days and warmer weather on the way, it’s a good time to take your gym routine outside. Luckily, Google’s Pixel Watch 4 can help you track all your outdoor fitness activities, and right...

item.title: Why JavaScript Engineers are Secretly C# Masters
item.description: Photo by Denis N. on Unsplash For a professional JavaScript developer, moving to TypeScript often feels like "cleaning up the room." But for those who look closer, TypeScript isn't just JavaScript...

item.title: Anthropic is suing the Department of Defense
item.description: Anthropic has sued the US government over its designation as a supply-chain risk, the latest move in a weekslong battle between it and the Pentagon over the acceptable use cases for its military...

item.title: Battlefield 6 teams hit with layoffs despite ‘biggest launch in franchise history’
item.description: Even a record-breaking launch can't seem to save developers from layoffs. According to a report from IGN, the various teams behind Battlefield 6 have been hit with an unspecified number of...

item.title: Live Nation settles government antitrust suit — that probably doesn’t include a breakup
item.description: On Monday, Live Nation-Ticketmaster agreed to settle a federal antitrust lawsuit with the Department of Justice. Eight states so far have indicated they plan to join the settlement, a district...

item.title: Donut Lab says latest test proves its solid-state battery isn’t a supercapacitor
item.description: When Donut Lab first announced its solid-state battery earlier this year, there was some speculation around whether the Finnish startup had actually produced a supercapacitor, which is a much...

item.title: Qualcomm’s partnership with Neura Robotics is just the beginning
item.description: Neura Robotics is going to build new robots on top of Qualcomm's new IQ10 processors that were released at CES.

item.title: Anthropic sues Defense Department over supply chain risk designation
item.description: Anthropic filed suit against the Department of Defense on Monday after the agency labeled it a supply chain risk. The complaint calls the DOD's actions "unprecedented and unlawful."

item.title: Yashica’s new retro point-and-shoot revival sounds surprisingly capable for $100
item.description: Yashica has announced a new throwback camera called the Tank for photographers embracing the recent resurgence in the popularity of point-and-shoots. But while Canon's resurrected Elph 360 HS...

item.title: Anthropic Sues Department of Defense Over Supply-Chain-Risk Designation
item.description: The Claude chatbot developer says the Trump administration overstepped by escalating a contract dispute into a federal ban on the company’s technology.

item.title: X says you can block Grok from editing your photos
item.description: X has introduced a new feature that makes it slightly harder for other users to manipulate your uploaded images with the Grok chatbot. As reported by Social Media Today and verified by The Verge,...

item.title: How AI is turning the Iran conflict into theater

item.title: Sandberg, Clegg join Nscale board as this ‘Stargate Norway’ startup hits $14.6B valuation
item.description: Nvidia-backed British AI infrastructure startup Nscale has raised another megaround of $2 billion.

item.title: Samsung’s Mario-themed microSD card for Switch 2 is 35 percent off
item.description: Nintendo has cut the cost of its Mario-themed Samsung microSD Express card with 256GB of storage, just in time for Mario Day. Normally $59.99 — and definitely not worth it at that price compared...

item.title: UNC4899 Breached Crypto Firm After Developer AirDropped Trojanized File to Work Device
item.description: The North Korean threat actor known as UNC4899 is suspected to be behind a sophisticated cloud compromise campaign targeting a cryptocurrency organization in 2025 to steal millions of dollars in...

item.title: Hasbro’s CEO has an AI Peppa Pig help design toys
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Chris Cocks, CEO of Hasbro. You know, Hasbro — the toy and game company that makes some of the most iconic products in the world, from toy lines like Transformers and My...

item.title: The usability imperative for securing digital asset devices
item.description: When Tony Fadell started working on the iPod, usability often trumped security. The result was an iterative process. Every time someone would find a security weakness or a way to hack the device,...

item.title: The Download: murky AI surveillance laws, and the White House cracks down on defiant labs
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Is the Pentagon allowed to surveil Americans with AI? The...

item.title: ⚡ Weekly Recap: Qualcomm 0-Day, iOS Exploit Chains, AirSnitch Attack & Vibe-Coded Malware
item.description: Another week in cybersecurity. Another week of "you've got to be kidding me." Attackers were busy. Defenders were busy. And somewhere in the middle, a whole lot of people had a very bad Monday...

item.title: Feeld Was a Dating App for the Freaks. Now Some People Call It ‘Normie Hell’
item.description: The app that catered to unconventional kinks is gaining steam among daters with vanilla preferences—and some aren’t happy about it.

item.title: Panic’s gaming ambitions hinge on the weird and whimsical
item.description: A game about an annoying goose with a button dedicated entirely to honking isn't the obvious recipe for a hit. But doing the less-obvious thing has become the norm for Panic's gaming efforts,...
